label: Concept/v2 attack card
seams: Always standard action regardless of named attack mode unless entered through combat action row
Does not inherently carry Autofire/Burst/Disarm/Charge context
Damage button loses most attack context

label: Legacy/other attack button
seams: Duplicate attack entry path
Same context loss as concept attack cards

label: Combat action row/button
dialog: Conditional: attack preroller, skill preroller, Aid Another dialog, or no dialog for manual/reference
economy: Depends on branch; attack/skill spend after confirmation, manual spends before chat, Aim spends swift
rollPath: Branch-specific: FullAttackExecutor, AidAnother, Aim, SWSERoll.rollAttack, rollSkillCheck, CombatEngine.executeAction, actor.useAction
seams: Mapper drops routing fields
Name/text guessing determines attack path
Reference actions can become fake executable buttons
Compound cost handling is weak

label: Full Attack branch
seams: Only works if source action data preserves resolutionMode
Needs verification for Double Attack, Triple Attack, Two-Weapon, Double Weapon

label: Aid Another
dialog: Aid Another dialog: attack vs Reflex 10 or skill vs DC 10
rollPath: rollSkillCheck() or SWSERoll.rollAttack() with manual targetContext
seams: Does not apply/persist +2 aid bonus
Ally target is note-only

label: Aim
dialog: No dialog; posts manual action status
rollPath: Next canonical rollAttack reads combatAim flag and consumes it
seams: Preroller also exposes Aiming checkbox
Aim is not target-bound
Intervening action invalidation is not enforced

label: Damage roll from attack chat
dialog: No damage dialog from chat button
seams: Only carries actor, weapon, crit, twoHanded, target
Loses Burst Fire, Autofire, areaAttack, hit/miss, Stun/Ion, Evasion, Deadeye/Rapid Shot context

label: Apply damage from chat
mutatesState: selected target HP/threshold effects via DamageSystem
seams: Amount-only application lacks damage packet semantics
No preserved Stun/Ion original damage, area hit/miss, Evasion, or target-specific context

label: Reaction buttons from attack chat
mutatesState: event/chat state if reaction engine updates it
seams: Depends on complete attack context
Sonic/Deflect and mixed packet cases need damage packet context

label: Action economy persistence
economy: Consumes action/reaction and stores actor flag foundryvtt-swse.actionEconomy
seams: Depends on normalized action type text
Prior 0H action substitution/full-round RAW concerns remain
